testcase.name: semanticHash differs for different amounts
truncated receipt without time or balance still parses
isMpesaSms true for lowercase mpesa
isMpesaSms true for code plus amount without keyword
PAYBILL extracts merchant name
parse returns error not_mpesa for unrelated SMS
old format RECEIVED You have received parses and routes DIRECT
parse correctly classifies REVERSAL of received payment
till number buy goods parses as BUY_GOODS
missing time falls back to start of day
SENT isExpense true isIncome false and transactionType transfer
SENT customer transfer format classified as SENT
sourceHash is stable across whitespace differences
parse rejects Fuliza service notice with fuliza_notice error
WITHDRAW isExpense true and transactionType expense
parse does not reject Fuliza charge notice with total outstanding
RECEIVED isIncome true isExpense false and transactionType income
date format dd-MMM-yy parses
sourceHash differs for different raw SMS
AIRTIME sent to phone format classified correctly
SENT to compact phone number classified as SENT
future date routes to REVIEW
date format MMM dd yyyy parses
Kopokopo paybill with account number parses as PAYBILL
AIRTIME isExpense true and transactionType expense
Paybill with account number and token strips metadata
isMpesaSms true for MPESA uppercase
old format SENT You have sent parses and routes DIRECT
parse correctly classifies BUY_GOODS transaction
Swahili fragment umepokea received parses
RECEIVED has HIGH confidence and DIRECT route
BUY_GOODS via Kopokopo extracts merchant
parse quarantines unrecognised M-Pesa SMS with code and amount
parse correctly classifies PAYBILL transaction
parse does not reject valid Fuliza repayment SMS
semanticHash is deterministic for identical transactions
parse returns error ambiguous_receipt for success-only SMS
implausible amount and unknown category quarantines
agent float deposit classified as DEPOSIT
PAYBILL isExpense true and transactionType expense
parse correctly classifies AIRTIME transaction
parse returns error no_amount when amount is missing
parse correctly classifies LOAN repayment
parse correctly classifies RECEIVED transaction
isFulizaServiceNotice true for access fee message
parse correctly classifies FULIZA_CHARGE notice
SENT extracts counterparty name excluding phone suffix
DEPOSIT isIncome true and transactionType income
parse correctly classifies WITHDRAW transaction
compact old format Received from parses
rejection ambiguous_receipt for generic success message
BUY_GOODS extracts merchant name
parse correctly classifies SENT transaction
parse includes non-empty ruleId and sourceHash
rejection not_mpesa for unrelated OTP SMS
RECEIVED alternative format Ksh received from
missing balance on high value routes to REVIEW
parse correctly classifies DEPOSIT transaction
parse returns error no_code when no 10-char code present
isMpesaSms true for M-PESA with hyphen
parse extracts balance and fee when present
parser is thread-safe under concurrent load
phone only counterparty routes to REVIEW
Kopokopo till payment extracts merchant and strips till number
parse extracts date without time
isMpesaSms false for unrelated SMS
LOAN isExpense false and transactionType fuliza
agent float withdrawal classified as WITHDRAW
parse extracts four-digit year date
reversed received transaction marks isReceivedReversal
parse classifies REVERSAL of sent payment
RECEIVED from bank extracts institution name
FULIZA_CHARGE isExpense false and transactionType fuliza
